last_update_date.description: Date and time of the last update for the bank account.

type.description: Type of bank account, specifying the format of the account number.

account_number.description: Account number associated with the bank account. E.g. IBAN in case of iban type

bic.description: The BIC (international identifier of the bank) for IBAN or OTHER-type bank accounts.

sort_code.description: The 6-digit sort code, assigned to UK financial institutions, for GB-type bank accounts.

institution_number.description: The 3-digit number assigned to Canadian financial institutions, for CA-type bank accounts.

branch_code.description: The 5-digit number assigned to branches of Canadian financial institutions, for CA-type bank accounts.

bank_name.description: Name of the bank associated with the bank account.

aba.description: The American Banking Association (ABA) routing number for US-type bank accounts.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code representing the country of the bank account.
